LanguageData.Rage.label: Rage gas
LanguageData.Rage.description: Filled with a specialized airbone agent that induces a blind, uncontrollable rage.
LanguageData.TearGas.label: Tear gas
LanguageData.TearGas.description: Filled with a specialized airbone agent that attacks the sensitive membranes of the eyes and nose, making it difficult to see or breathe.
LanguageData.Sleep.label: Sleep gas
LanguageData.Sleep.description: Filled with a powerful sedative, capable of knocking unconscious anyone exposed to it.
LanguageData.Fear.label: Fear gas
LanguageData.Fear.description: Filled with a specialized airbone agent that induces an extremely strong feeling of dread and terror.
LanguageData.Acid.label: Corrosive gas
LanguageData.Acid.description: Filled with an extremely strong acid, capable of quickly burning flesh and metal alike.
LanguageData.MechVirus.label: Nanomachine
LanguageData.MechVirus.description: Contains nanomachines designed to latch onto and wreck havoc on the systems of mechanoids. Ineffective against organic life.
LanguageData.AntiInsect.label: Insecticide
LanguageData.AntiInsect.description: Filled with a special aerosol designed to kill insectoids.
